mypaintr 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Hand Demo
    • Introduction to mypaintr

Compute a rough polygon outline

Source: R/draw-rough.R
rough_polygon.Rd

Compute a rough polygon outline

Usage

rough_polygon(x, y = NULL, hand = NULL)

Arguments

x, y

Polygon coordinates.

hand

Hand-drawn geometry settings created with hand().

Value

A list with x and y components containing a roughened closed outline suitable for plotting with graphics::lines().

Examples

rough_polygon(c(2, 5, 8, 3), c(2, 7, 5, 1))
#> $x
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.047270 2.094470 2.141593 2.188632 2.235579 2.282429 2.329175
#>   [9] 2.375810 2.422330 2.468729 2.515003 2.561146 2.607154 2.653025 2.698753
#>  [17] 2.744338 2.789776 2.835064 2.880202 2.925187 2.970019 3.014698 3.059889
#>  [25] 3.107246 3.154583 3.201881 3.249123 3.296290 3.343365 3.390329 3.437163
#>  [33] 3.483852 3.530376 3.576718 3.622862 3.668790 3.714488 3.759939 3.805127
#>  [41] 3.850040 3.894662 3.938982 3.982986 4.026663 4.070004 4.111166 4.149982
#>  [49] 4.188673 4.227253 4.265741 4.304152 4.342504 4.380811 4.419092 4.457361
#>  [57] 4.495634 4.533927 4.572255 4.610632 4.649072 4.687590 4.726199 4.764911
#>  [65] 4.803739 4.842695 4.881789 4.921031 4.960432 5.000000 5.073150 5.146336
#>  [73] 5.219537 5.292735 5.365912 5.439046 5.512120 5.585113 5.658006 5.730781
#>  [81] 5.803419 5.875901 5.948211 6.020331 6.091798 6.162906 6.233749 6.304326
#>  [89] 6.374635 6.444675 6.514447 6.583955 6.653203 6.722195 6.790940 6.859445
#>  [97] 6.927719 6.995773 7.063704 7.131480 7.199059 7.266455 7.333679 7.400747
#> [105] 7.467674 7.534476 7.601168 7.667768 7.734293 7.800761 7.867189 7.933596
#> [113] 8.000000 7.931367 7.862694 7.793988 7.725252 7.656492 7.587715 7.518924
#> [121] 7.450126 7.381327 7.312532 7.243747 7.174978 7.106232 7.037512 6.968827
#> [129] 6.900182 6.831582 6.763034 6.694544 6.626117 6.557760 6.489478 6.421276
#> [137] 6.353161 6.285138 6.218891 6.152968 6.087222 6.021648 5.956240 5.890993
#> [145] 5.825902 5.760959 5.696159 5.631494 5.566957 5.502542 5.438239 5.374042
#> [153] 5.309943 5.245933 5.182004 5.118148 5.054356 4.990620 4.926931 4.863281
#> [161] 4.799660 4.736061 4.672475 4.607075 4.541427 4.475887 4.410457 4.345141
#> [169] 4.279938 4.214852 4.149883 4.085032 4.020300 3.955687 3.891192 3.826817
#> [177] 3.762559 3.698418 3.634394 3.570483 3.506684 3.442996 3.379415 3.315938
#> [185] 3.252563 3.189285 3.126102 3.063008 3.000000 2.935508 2.871076 2.806780
#> [193] 2.742688 2.678866 2.615694 2.553060 2.490824 2.428941 2.367352 2.305682

#>

#>   [1] 2.000000 2.070189 2.140420 2.210696 2.281024 2.351406 2.421847 2.492350

#>  [33] 4.263312 4.333949 4.404694 4.475558 4.546552 4.617684 4.688964 4.760402
#>  [41] 4.832005 4.903782 4.975741 5.047890 5.120234 5.192780 5.266634 5.341895
#>  [49] 5.417231 5.492634 5.568092 5.643596 5.719136 5.794702 5.870284 5.945873
#>  [57] 6.021460 6.097035 6.172589 6.248114 6.323600 6.399040 6.474425 6.549749
